textByHashes.0d1f2afb6888dc5ff16d116d485988a7b1b69d8d: Hello. Welcome to the Gielinor Housing Agency! What can I do for you?
textByHashes.32bdab280513730455492ee8843789b5dbd26680: Where would you like it moved to?
textByHashes.82372d1ab3f6c83c53474c170cbe23e44230945d: Hmph. Come back when you have 5,000 coins.
textByHashes.c6e120a309f6127013e7af2d0026923c61301969: Your house has been moved to Rimmington.
textByHashes.9ab6e37b2c060b8c4dee00add34ac2f52c2d83fa: I'm afraid you don't have a high enough Construction level to move there. You need to have level 10.
textByHashes.dd3a010d79a72a2a0b55b841f95ef411e17fe9dc: Your house has been moved to Taverley.
textByHashes.2dc1f6539c433bf36551e5a42801ec74f04919c8: I'm afraid you don't have a high enough Construction level to move there. You need to have level 20.
textByHashes.226dac49edd2e87cdf4f7313ade8760b20db5122: Hmph. Come back when you have 7,500 coins.
textByHashes.f80d98cf00fd15f3e967c4469bcf729b76500c76: Your house has been moved to Pollnivneach.
textByHashes.d56e9b0188f6bf0081a38ba96015c0750d615677: I'm afraid you don't have a high enough Construction level to move there. You need to have level 25.
textByHashes.e8993356b22b7799f2159a77549dadf727d02577: Hmph. Come back when you have 8,750 coins.
textByHashes.0e8856fa7fac84132b9a0ada754fa1f124a9feda: Absolutely. Hand me your blueprints and I'll make it happen! I'll keep the blueprints, so you'll always be able to switch back to this style in future, for a small fee.
textByHashes.bb31e469ac5bb3ff1626155080d6e7ce85282364: Your house has been moved to Hosidius.
textByHashes.177e2a249c60b3f8bb6540d109c82e5a27ceaa76: I'm afraid you don't have a high enough Construction level to move there. You need to have level 30.
textByHashes.634fa47242fc2643f5b611637bfd520e0da861bc: Hmph. Come back when you have 10,000 coins.
textByHashes.edd74a8d3fdd7179b254b4064c67e38250b08e02: Your house has been moved to Rellekka.
textByHashes.7c196755992d8d30813b09c775dbd76a0f9dc1e0: I'm afraid you don't have a high enough Construction level to move there. You need to have level 40.
textByHashes.49766cb80a3840fc30e2b75c8111ffd59a18069f: Hmph. Come back when you have 15,000 coins.
textByHashes.c554f7ccec000691f86e2f4f941eeaca74ba6345: Your house has been moved to Brimhaven.
textByHashes.a711e63eeb5fbf1c0d24f9afc3f3bee804ce777c: I'm afraid you don't have a high enough Construction level to move there. You need to have level 50.
textByHashes.a55581800d605e148ad3dba1c67aebd3e7e303e5: Hmph. Come back when you have 25,000 coins.
textByHashes.b87e5c04ac7da480373b49cda962ad999827b15b: Your house has been moved to Yanille.
textByHashes.2d6d2918f656ccfe0a3e9cb812936ab1a1601c1c: I'm afraid you don't have a high enough Construction level to move there. You need to have level 70.
textByHashes.72c455359860b882e5a4e7929e80594e8c23e07c: Hmph. Come back when you have 50,000 coins.
textByHashes.fc7a3f7e7eb6e8d6afb6ab81d425f8b0bc2f1637: Your house has been moved to Prifddinas.
textByHashes.f88a1220459168624a6fef27c64ba1a7149809d0: Certainly. My magic can rebuild the house in a completely new style! What style would you like?
textByHashes.26849955cf360afdc5fcdf499165eec931ecb5f5: Your house is already in that style!
textByHashes.c0aa6c9f4571e2fbb755326d823a2ae8c60d97cd: I'm afraid you haven't unlocked that style.
textByHashes.0a254a1b36645e46ce10a14932759d79d09ab469: Hmph. Come back when you have 35,000 coins.
textByHashes.01cbe12a26c277ed6e8c78541cb8f5addc412850: I'm afraid I'd need some blueprints for that.
textByHashes.b89aa15854984415c58a505b62216af1ff7605d2: I'm afraid I'd need some blueprints for that. Maybe you can buy some by working for the contractors.
textByHashes.82e7c735461e994c2a441a64fb8eabe677dbdb27: Not until you free up some inventory space.
textByHashes.17d9f4a6f4cd43ccc15dafc8ef806473e104075e: It all came out of the wizards' experiments. They found a way to fold space, so that they could pack many acres of land into an area only a foot across.
textByHashes.db5d00da784c8191962527f5a4c4ae0983de7ae5: They created several folded-space regions across Gielinor. Each one contains hundreds of small plots where people can build houses.
textByHashes.092005c82a286313115d47b94e6a2690ffb3cf5f: Quite. The wizards didn't want to get bogged down in the business side of things so they hired me to sell the houses.
textByHashes.dd5f8fe5629eb94da2276058038407e0e925ad5f: There are various other people across Gielinor who can help you furnish your house.
textByHashes.7c98f74e2da93d02bf8ea2a14bf1ce8e9d01e92a: You should start by buying planks from a sawmill operator. Sawmills are located in north-east Varrock, the Woodcutting Guild located in south-west Hosidius and north-east Prifddinas.
textByHashes.de6cbc6ff6f1fa00ea71bcbb9fb014fb14bc0a8c: As you may know, skillcapes are only available to masters in a skill. I have spent my entire life building houses and now I spend my time selling them! As a sign of my abilities I wear this Skillcape of Construction.
textByHashes.d7e22792130a48524c0797a761f8c56de41c4b3d: If you ever have enough skill to build a demonic throne, come and talk to me and I'll sell you a skillcape like mine.
textByHashes.bf289eeebde280cf00b7db37970c1db5ab7097a8: The Cape of Construction also provides you with as many teleports as you like to any of the house portals or even directly inside!
textByHashes.b471f367eb644ad511f4f21b7fe65584bdf5953b: Alright, that'll be 99000 coins, please. A small price to pay for such an illustrious cape that can teleport you to any of the house portals or even directly inside your house!
textByHashes.3036e1f19881fba5e405c470e26a80650d76afb0: Suit yourself. There are many other heroes who would love the opportunity to purchase one. You can find me here if you change your mind.
textByHashes.51fa37d1170bc1f1df9b1be904847b619638c195: Well, come back and see me when you do.
textByHashes.58f1fdd904d724b985799470ba396e43535885d8: Unfortunately all Skillcapes are only available with a free hood, it's part of a skill promotion deal; buy one get one free, you know. So you'll need to free up some inventory space before I can sell you one.
textByHashes.b6c0420f5c5fa4d315ad8d2fb05245550678b65f: Excellent! Wear that cape with pride my friend.
